languages.text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's turn, highlights {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells in a 8-cell range around him. While staying in these cells, Pasqal is considered a {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Pain-Seeker{/g}. Also, the first attack in each cell doesn't count for the attack limit.
One cell is always located in the 3-cell radius around Pasqal.

traits.locale_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's turn, highlights {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells in a 8-cell range around him. While staying in these cells, Pasqal is considered a {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Pain-Seeker{/g}. Also, the first attack in each cell doesn't count for the attack limit.
One cell is always located in the 3-cell radius around Pasqal.

languages.text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

One cell is always located in the 3-cell radius around Pasqal.

traits.locale_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's turn, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony-probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the attack limit per turn.

While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

languages.text:
Позволяет Паскалю использовать мехадендриты.
В начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} Паскаля вокруг него (в радиусе 8 клеток) подсвечиваются клетки в количестве {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972}. Хотя бы одна из них будет находиться в радиусе 3 клеток от него.
Пока Паскаль стоит на одной из подсвеченных клеток, на него действует эффект {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}изыскатель страдания{/g}. Первая атака, совершаемая Паскалем с каждой из подсвеченных клеток, не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

Позволяет Паскалю использовать мехадендриты.
В начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} Паскаля вокруг него (в радиусе 8 клеток) подсвечиваются клетки в количестве {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972}. Хотя бы одна из них будет находиться в радиусе 3 клеток от него.
Пока Паскаль стоит на одной из подсвеченных клеток, на него действует эффект {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}изыскатель страдания{/g}. Первая атака, совершаемая Паскалем с каждой из подсвеченных клеток, не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.

languages.text:
Permet à Pasqal d'utiliser des mécadendrites.
Au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cases dans un rayon de 8 cases autour de lui (dont l'une à une distance de 3 cases maximum) sont mises en évidence.
Lorsqu'il se trouve sur l'une d'elles, il bénéficie de l'effet {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Sonde d'agonie neuronale{/g} et la première attaque qu'il lance en se tenant sur chacune de ces cases n'est pas déduite du {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}nombre maximum d'attaques par tour{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

Permet à Pasqal d'utiliser des mécadendrites.
Au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cases dans un rayon de 8 cases autour de lui (dont l'une à une distance de 3 cases maximum) sont mises en évidence.
Lorsqu'il se trouve sur l'une d'elles, il bénéficie de l'effet {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Sonde d'agonie neuronale{/g} et la première attaque qu'il lance en se tenant sur chacune de ces cases n'est pas déduite du {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}nombre maximum d'attaques par tour{/g}.

languages.text:
Pasqal'ın mekadentrit kullanmasına olanak tanır.
Pasqal'ın {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında etrafındaki 8 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} hücre (bu hücrelerden biri, Pasqal'ın etrafındaki 3 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunmalıdır) vurgulu gösterilir.
Pasqal, bu hücrelerden birinde durduğunda {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sinirsel ızdırap sondası{/g} etkisinden etkilenir. Pasqal'ın bu hücrelerden birinde dururken yaptığı ilk saldırı, {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}tur başına saldırı{/g} sınırından sayılmaz.
languages.original_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Pasqal'ın mekadentrit kullanmasına olanak tanır.
Pasqal'ın {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında etrafındaki 8 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} hücre (bu hücrelerden biri, Pasqal'ın etrafındaki 3 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunmalıdır) vurgulu gösterilir.
Pasqal, bu hücrelerden birinde durduğunda {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sinirsel ızdırap sondası{/g} etkisinden etkilenir. Pasqal'ın bu hücrelerden birinde dururken yaptığı ilk saldırı, {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}tur başına saldırı{/g} sınırından sayılmaz.

languages.text:
允许帕斯卡使用机械触须。
帕斯卡{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，其周围8格内的{uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972}个格子（其中1个必定在3格内）会高亮显示。
帕斯卡站在其中1个高亮格子上时，受到{g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}神经痛苦探针{/g}效果影响。帕斯卡站在每个高亮格子上进行的首次攻击不计入{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}每回合的攻击上限{/g}。
languages.original_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
允许帕斯卡使用机械触须。
帕斯卡{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，其周围8格内的{uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972}个格子（其中1个必定在3格内）会高亮显示。
帕斯卡站在其中1个高亮格子上时，受到{g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}神经痛苦探针{/g}效果影响。帕斯卡站在每个高亮格子上进行的首次攻击不计入{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}每回合的攻击上限{/g}。

languages.text:
Permite a Pasqal utilizar mecadendritas.
Al comienzo del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de Pasqal, se resaltan {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} casillas en un radio de 8 casillas a su alrededor (una de ellas debe estar en un radio de 3 casillas a su alrededor).
Mientras Pasqal se encuentre en una de esas casillas, estará bajo el efecto {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sonda de agonía neural{/g}. El primer ataque efectuado por Pasqal desde cada una de esas casillas no cuenta para su {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}límite de ataques por turno{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Permite a Pasqal utilizar mecadendritas.
Al comienzo del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de Pasqal, se resaltan {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} casillas en un radio de 8 casillas a su alrededor (una de ellas debe estar en un radio de 3 casillas a su alrededor).
Mientras Pasqal se encuentre en una de esas casillas, estará bajo el efecto {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sonda de agonía neural{/g}. El primer ataque efectuado por Pasqal desde cada una de esas casillas no cuenta para su {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}límite de ataques por turno{/g}.

languages.text:
Ermöglich Pasqal den Einsatz von Mechadendriten.
Zu Beginn von Pasqals {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} werden {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} Felder in einem Radius von 8 Feldern um ihn herum markiert (eines dieser Felder muss sich in einem Radius von 3 Feldern befinden).
Steht Pasqal auf einem dieser Felder, wird er mit dem Effekt {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Neurale Schmerzsonde{/g} belegt. Der erste Angriff, den Pasqal auf einem dieser Felder macht, fließt nicht in das {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}Angriffslimit pro Zug{/g} ein.
languages.original_text:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Ermöglich Pasqal den Einsatz von Mechadendriten.
Zu Beginn von Pasqals {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} werden {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} Felder in einem Radius von 8 Feldern um ihn herum markiert (eines dieser Felder muss sich in einem Radius von 3 Feldern befinden).
Steht Pasqal auf einem dieser Felder, wird er mit dem Effekt {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Neurale Schmerzsonde{/g} belegt. Der erste Angriff, den Pasqal auf einem dieser Felder macht, fließt nicht in das {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}Angriffslimit pro Zug{/g} ein.

languages.text:
パスカルが機械触手を使用できるようになる。
パスカルの{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時、彼を中心とした半径8マス以内の{uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972}マス（うち1マスは彼を中心とした半径3マス以内でなければならない）が強調表示される。
パスカルがそれらのマスのいずれかに立っている間、彼は{g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}神経苦痛プローブ{/g}効果の影響を受ける。それらの各マス上に立っている間にパスカルが行う最初の攻撃は、{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}ターンあたりの攻撃回数制限{/g}にカウントされない。

While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.
